actions.description: Pause execution for N seconds with optional skip mechanisms.
actions.summary: Pause execution for N seconds with optional skip mechanisms.

variables.name: delay
variables.description: Number of seconds to delay (default: 1)

variables.name: rand
variables.description: Additional random seconds to add to delay (default: 0)

variables.name: message
variables.description: Optional message to print before delaying

variables.name: mode_skip_key
variables.description: Whether pressing 's' should skip the delay (default: true)

variables.name: mode_scroll_lock_skip
variables.description: Whether toggling Scroll Lock should skip the delay (default: true, Windows only)

actions.returns: empty string normally; may early-return on skip
